description: Back at the Lighthouse, Jaco fakes respiratory distress until a guard enters, at which point he suddenly breathes fire, attacking the agent. Mack realizes Jaco's intent was to break free and facilitate Sarge's escape. The S.H.I.E.L.D. team re-secures Jaco after this dangerous outburst.

transcript.line: We found two of those creatures. Director sent me to see if...
This is Agent Khan. We're gonna need a medical team. The big guy's not breathing. Um...
Cancel that medical team! I need a rescue team! Aah! This guy's breathing now, but he's breathing fire!
Stand by, Agent Khan. Almost there. Brace yourself, comin' in violent.
Glad I could be useful. I guess we know why he didn't want our help. He wasn't sick.
He was turning into a dragon.
Yeah. And the Sarge's ticket out of here.
Agent Rodriguez is en route on the Quinjet. She got her man, too.
